sqls.sql: SELECT t.revenue_currency, COUNT(*) AS total_transfers, SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_transfers, ROUND(SUM(t.send_amount)::numeric, 2) AS total_send_volume, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN t.send_amount ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS completed_send_volume, ROUND(SUM(t.total_revenue)::numeric, 2) AS total_revenue_all_status, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN t.total_revenue ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS completed_total_revenue, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN t.fee_revenue ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS completed_fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN t.fx_margin_revenue ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS completed_fx_margin_revenue FROM fct_transfers t JOIN dim_customers c ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.default_currency = 'GBP' AND t.created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND t.created_at < '2026-04-01' GROUP BY t.revenue_currency

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', t.created_at)::date AS month, COUNT(*) AS total_transfers, SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_transfers, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN t.send_amount ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS completed_send_volume, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN t.total_revenue ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS completed_total_revenue, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN t.fee_revenue ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS completed_fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN t.fx_margin_revenue ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS completed_fx_margin_revenue FROM fct_transfers t JOIN dim_customers c ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.default_currency = 'GBP' AND t.created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND t.created_at < '2026-04-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT t.receive_country, t.receive_currency, t.send_currency, COUNT(*) AS total_transfers, SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed_transfers, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN t.send_amount ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS completed_send_volume, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN t.total_revenue ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS completed_total_revenue, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN t.fee_revenue ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS completed_fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.is_completed THEN t.fx_margin_revenue ELSE 0 END)::numeric, 2) AS completed_fx_margin_revenue FROM fct_transfers t JOIN dim_customers c ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.default_currency = 'GBP' AND t.created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND t.created_at < '2026-04-01' GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 ORDER BY completed_total_revenue DESC
SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'raw_core_transfers' ORDER BY table_name

SELECT t.send_currency AS revenue_currency, COUNT(*) AS total_transfers, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') AS completed_transfers, ROUND(SUM(t.send_amount) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'), 2) AS completed_send_volume, ROUND(SUM(t.fee_amount) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'), 2) AS completed_fee_amount, ROUND(SUM(t.send_amount * t.fx_margin_bps / 10000.0) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'), 2) AS completed_fx_margin_modelled, ROUND( SUM(t.fee_amount) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') + SUM(t.send_amount * t.fx_margin_bps / 10000.0) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') , 2) AS completed_total_revenue_modelled FROM raw_core_transfers.transfers t JOIN raw_core_transfers.customers c ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.currency = 'GBP' AND t.created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND t.created_at < '2026-04-01' GROUP BY t.send_currency

SELECT tf.fee_type, COUNT(*) AS fee_line_count, ROUND(SUM(tf.amount), 2) AS total_amount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN tf.is_waived THEN tf.amount ELSE 0 END), 2) AS waived_amount, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN NOT tf.is_waived THEN tf.amount ELSE 0 END), 2) AS effective_amount FROM raw_core_transfers.transfers t JOIN raw_core_transfers.customers c ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id JOIN raw_core_transfers.transfer_fees tf ON t.transfer_id = tf.transfer_id WHERE c.currency = 'GBP' AND t.created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND t.created_at < '2026-04-01' AND t.status = 'COMPLETED' GROUP BY tf.fee_type ORDER BY effective_amount DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', t.created_at)::date AS month, COUNT(*) AS total_transfers, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') AS completed_transfers, ROUND(SUM(t.send_amount) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'), 2) AS completed_send_volume, ROUND(SUM(t.fee_amount) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'), 2) AS completed_fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(t.send_amount * t.fx_margin_bps / 10000.0) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'), 2) AS completed_fx_margin_revenue, ROUND( SUM(t.fee_amount) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') + SUM(t.send_amount * t.fx_margin_bps / 10000.0) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') , 2) AS completed_total_revenue FROM raw_core_transfers.transfers t JOIN raw_core_transfers.customers c ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.currency = 'GBP' AND t.created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND t.created_at < '2026-04-01' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT t.receive_country, t.receive_currency, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') AS completed_transfers, ROUND(SUM(t.send_amount) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'), 2) AS completed_send_volume, ROUND( SUM(t.fee_amount) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') + SUM(t.send_amount * t.fx_margin_bps / 10000.0) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') , 2) AS completed_total_revenue, ROUND(SUM(t.fee_amount) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'), 2) AS completed_fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(t.send_amount * t.fx_margin_bps / 10000.0) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'), 2) AS completed_fx_margin_revenue FROM raw_core_transfers.transfers t JOIN raw_core_transfers.customers c ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.currency = 'GBP' AND t.created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND t.created_at < '2026-04-01' GROUP BY 1, 2 HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') > 0 ORDER BY completed_total_revenue DESC

SELECT DISTINCT ON (base_currency, quote_currency) base_currency, quote_currency, mid_rate, ts_iso FROM raw_fx.fx_rates WHERE quote_currency = 'GBP' AND base_currency IN ('EUR', 'USD') ORDER BY base_currency, quote_currency, ts_iso DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', t.created_at)::date AS month, t.send_currency, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') AS completed_transfers, ROUND(SUM(t.fee_amount) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'), 2) AS completed_fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(t.send_amount * t.fx_margin_bps / 10000.0) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'), 2) AS completed_fx_margin_revenue, ROUND( SUM(t.fee_amount) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') + SUM(t.send_amount * t.fx_margin_bps / 10000.0) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') , 2) AS completed_total_revenue FROM raw_core_transfers.transfers t JOIN raw_core_transfers.customers c ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.currency = 'GBP' AND t.created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND t.created_at < '2026-04-01' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1, 2

SELECT DISTINCT ON (base_currency, quote_currency) base_currency, quote_currency, mid_rate, ts_iso FROM raw_fx.fx_rates WHERE (quote_currency = 'GBP' AND base_currency IN ('EUR', 'USD')) OR (base_currency = 'GBP' AND quote_currency IN ('EUR', 'USD')) ORDER BY base_currency, quote_currency, ts_iso DESC

SELECT t.receive_country, t.receive_currency, t.send_currency, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') AS completed_transfers, ROUND(SUM(t.send_amount) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'), 2) AS completed_send_volume, ROUND( SUM(t.fee_amount) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') + SUM(t.send_amount * t.fx_margin_bps / 10000.0) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') , 2) AS completed_total_revenue, ROUND(SUM(t.fee_amount) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'), 2) AS completed_fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(t.send_amount * t.fx_margin_bps / 10000.0) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED'), 2) AS completed_fx_margin_revenue FROM raw_core_transfers.transfers t JOIN raw_core_transfers.customers c ON t.customer_id = c.customer_id WHERE c.currency = 'GBP' AND t.created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND t.created_at < '2026-04-01' GROUP BY 1, 2, 3 HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE t.status = 'COMPLETED') > 0 ORDER BY completed_total_revenue DESC

runs.label: 15:45 mart backed
runs.final_summary: Q1 2026 completed GBP transfer revenue: £2,530.33 across 190 transfers (91.6% FX margin, 7.7% fees)

sqls.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as transfer_count, ROUND(SUM(fee_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(fx_margin_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_fx_margin_revenue, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_revenue, MIN(created_at::date) as earliest_transfer, MAX(created_at::date) as latest_transfer FROM fct_transfers WHERE send_currency = 'GBP' AND is_completed = true AND created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND created_at < '2026-04-01'

SELECT status_clean, COUNT(*) as transfer_count, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_revenue FROM fct_transfers WHERE send_currency = 'GBP' AND created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND created_at < '2026-04-01' GROUP BY status_clean ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)::date as revenue_month, TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at), 'Mon YYYY') as month_label, COUNT(*) as transfer_count, ROUND(SUM(fee_revenue)::numeric, 2) as fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(fx_margin_revenue)::numeric, 2) as fx_margin_revenue, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_revenue FROM fct_transfers WHERE send_currency = 'GBP' AND is_completed = true AND created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND created_at < '2026-04-01' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT ROUND(SUM(fee_revenue)::numeric, 2) as fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(fx_margin_revenue)::numeric, 2) as fx_margin_revenue, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_revenue, ROUND((SUM(fee_revenue) + SUM(fx_margin_revenue) - SUM(total_revenue))::numeric, 2) as promo_discount_implied FROM fct_transfers WHERE send_currency = 'GBP' AND is_completed = true AND created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND created_at < '2026-04-01'

SELECT COUNT(*) as transfer_count, ROUND(SUM(fee_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(fx_margin_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_fx_margin_revenue, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_revenue, MIN(created_at::date) as earliest_transfer, MAX(created_at::date) as latest_transfer FROM fct_transfers WHERE send_currency = 'GBP' AND is_completed = true AND created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND created_at < '2026-04-01'

SELECT status_clean, COUNT(*) as transfer_count, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_revenue FROM fct_transfers WHERE send_currency = 'GBP' AND created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND created_at < '2026-04-01' GROUP BY status_clean ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)::date as revenue_month, TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at), 'Mon YYYY') as month_label, COUNT(*) as transfer_count, ROUND(SUM(fee_revenue)::numeric, 2) as fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(fx_margin_revenue)::numeric, 2) as fx_margin_revenue, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_revenue FROM fct_transfers WHERE send_currency = 'GBP' AND is_completed = true AND created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND created_at < '2026-04-01' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT ROUND(SUM(fee_revenue)::numeric, 2) as fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(fx_margin_revenue)::numeric, 2) as fx_margin_revenue, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_revenue, ROUND((SUM(fee_revenue) + SUM(fx_margin_revenue) - SUM(total_revenue))::numeric, 2) as promo_discount_implied FROM fct_transfers WHERE send_currency = 'GBP' AND is_completed = true AND created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND created_at < '2026-04-01'

SELECT COUNT(*) as transfer_count, ROUND(SUM(fee_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(fx_margin_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_fx_margin_revenue, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_revenue, MIN(created_at::date) as earliest_transfer, MAX(created_at::date) as latest_transfer FROM analytics_marts.fct_transfers WHERE send_currency = 'GBP' AND is_completed = true AND created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND created_at < '2026-04-01'

SELECT status_clean, COUNT(*) as transfer_count, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_revenue FROM analytics_marts.fct_transfers WHERE send_currency = 'GBP' AND created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND created_at < '2026-04-01' GROUP BY status_clean ORDER BY total_revenue DESC

SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at)::date as revenue_month, TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', created_at), 'Mon YYYY') as month_label, COUNT(*) as transfer_count, ROUND(SUM(fee_revenue)::numeric, 2) as fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(fx_margin_revenue)::numeric, 2) as fx_margin_revenue, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_revenue FROM analytics_marts.fct_transfers WHERE send_currency = 'GBP' AND is_completed = true AND created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND created_at < '2026-04-01' GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 1

SELECT ROUND(SUM(fee_revenue)::numeric, 2) as fee_revenue, ROUND(SUM(fx_margin_revenue)::numeric, 2) as fx_margin_revenue, ROUND(SUM(total_revenue)::numeric, 2) as total_revenue, ROUND((SUM(fee_revenue) + SUM(fx_margin_revenue) - SUM(total_revenue))::numeric, 2) as promo_discount_implied FROM analytics_marts.fct_transfers WHERE send_currency = 'GBP' AND is_completed = true AND created_at >= '2026-01-01' AND created_at < '2026-04-01'
